'''TT-6''' was a [[Multi-Troop Transport/Legends|Multi-Troop Transport]] in the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] [[Trade Federation Droid Army/Legends|Droid Army]] around [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]].

TT-6 was designated as the primary command liaison transport during the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]], and carried the majority of [[OOM command battle droid/Legends|battle droid officers]] on [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]], conveyed to the planet's surface via a [[C-9979 landing craft/Legends|C-9979 landing craft]]. It was given priority to unload as soon as the landing zone was cleared.
